title: To the mathematicians
wikitext:
[]: To the mathematicians...             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 25, 2008 6:33 am If you can stop playing with your atomic bombs and Large Hardon Combiner for five minutes you can do something useful for a change and tell us how big Rei's tits are. I seek your help to apply SCIENCE to the question of Rei's dimensions. The problem that stands before us like the walls of Troy is that Rei is not a 3-dimensional object which we can loop a tape measure around and easily read off her glorious measurements. We have to work with what we've got. The unit of measurement doesn't matter as long as it is consistently applied, taking into account variations in scale - as we now have the diameter of Rei at BWH and we know the circumference of a circle is equal to the diameter by pi we can use c = pi*d - 13*pi → 41 8*pi → 25 16*pi → 50 - her bust to waist to hip ratio can be expressed roughly as 8:5:10 using the above numbers. Using that ratio if we assume her bust measurement is 32 inches that would make her waist measurement 20 inches and her hips 40 inches. All this of course is a complete waste of time as any cross-section of Rei wouldn't be a perfect circle--no, Rei is composed of delicious irregular shapes! Ideally then we need sideshots of Rei to determine the projection of her tits and ass to input into an equation, the maths to work something like this out are beyond me. Two of the most promising screenshots are these - need to take into account that Rei is on her back though.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jul 25, 2008 9:21 am Asuka is officially, canonically more "generously endowed" than Ms Mosquito Bites is. 'nuff said.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 9:32 am Large Hardon Combiner

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Jul 25, 2008 9:39 am Lol sexual in-your-end-oh! But srsly, now that we have a frontal ratio of her three sizes and the other images, someone can create a 3D mesh frame in a CAD program and compare it to that mesh image until they match, lower the height of the mesh figure until it matches Rei's designated height, then get the specific measurements. Disregard the fact that this requires time, effort, and money, or that Rei's size changes from scene to scene. The only consistency I've scene regarding character's bodies in the entire series is the asymmetry of Asuka's nipples. What are you expecting?

[]: Re: To the mathematicians...             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Jul 25, 2008 9:50 am Zuggy wrote: The problem that stands before us like the walls of Troy is that Rei is not a 3-dimensional object which we can loop a tape measure around and easily read off her glorious measurements. We have to work with what we've got. The unit of measurement doesn't matter as long as it is consistently applied, taking into account variations in scale - as we now have the diameter of Rei at BWH and we know the circumference of a circle is equal to the diameter by pi we can use c = pi*d - 13*pi → 41 8*pi → 25 16*pi → 50 - her bust to waist to hip ratio can be expressed roughly as 8:5:10 using the above numbers. Using that ratio if we assume her bust measurement is 32 inches that would make her waist measurement 20 inches and her hips 40 inches.

[]: Re: To the mathematicians...             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Jul 25, 2008 9:55 am Gamer_2k4 wrote: That seems way off. Aren't 40 inch hips quite a bit bigger than "ideal"?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 25, 2008 10:18 am Gamer wrote: That seems way off. Aren't 40 inch hips quite a bit bigger than "ideal"?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 25, 2008 10:27 am Zuggy wrote: The way you could show Rei's measurements accurately using circles is to have each circle have the same area as each cross-section at BWH, then the circumference of those circles would match her actual measurements.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 25, 2008 10:34 am Ahh, I was thinking too simplistically. I'm trying to think of what a tape measure around the body looks like from above, and it's a rectangleish oval. You're a maths genius Ornette, can you think of anything?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 10:46 am I would gather that Rei's shape is changes throughout the show for dramatic effect, like the evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 11:07 am ^Feh. Rei at least has the excuse that she is made of partical/wave matter, which we know seems to pull mass in and out of thin air for no reason.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jul 25, 2008 11:56 am The Bastard King wrote: Lol sexual in-your-end-oh! The only consistency I've scene regarding character's bodies in the entire series is the asymmetry of Asuka's nipples. What are you expecting?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:04 pm Assuming my numbers are right, I have proof positive that Rei is horribly anorexic. I opened up the image in a drawing program and counted the number of pixels for Rei's different diameters, as well as her height. B: 120 px W: 75 px H: 150 px Height: 930 px (note that this was taking into account that her feet are pointing down) The Evapedia says that Rei is 4'7", or 57 inches tall. Dividing 930 pixels by 57 gives us... .0613 inches per pixel Multiplying that out for each diameter gives us the following numbers: B: 7.35 inches W: 4.6 inches H: 9.2 inches That's right folks; if the picture is accurate, then Rei's waist is less than 5 inches across. THAT'S AS WIDE AS MY HAND. (Fingers together, lowest thumb joint to opposite side of the hand.) Rei is LITTLE.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:12 pm Thats just more proof that the "official" numbers on the characters heights are full of shit; we already had a thread about Misato's "official" hight, and the consensus was that the characters heights in the show only matter in relation to each other, as a device to show age differences. Nothing more. Besides, the Japanese are famous for being slightly short.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:38 pm Zuggy wrote: You're a maths genius Ornette, can you think of anything?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:43 pm Formless One wrote: Thats just more proof that the "official" numbers on the characters heights are full of shit; we already had a thread about Misato's "official" hight, and the consensus was that the characters heights in the show only matter in relation to each other, as a device to show age differences. Nothing more.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:50 pm Anime physics is what isn't right here. Everyone in the show has unrealistic proportions. Yet, no one makes a big deal about it. Frankly, as a rule, in almost any cartoon or comic the characters are drawn slightly less realistic than their surroundings. ( Yes, anime and manga count as styles of cartooning/animation.)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:57 pm I think this in inevitably going nowhere...........

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:58 pm Formless One wrote: Anime physics is what isn't right here. Everyone in the show has unrealistic proportions. Yet, no one makes a big deal about it. Frankly, as a rule, in almost any cartoon or comic the characters are drawn slightly less realistic than their surroundings. ( Yes, anime and manga count as styles of cartooning/animation.)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 2:01 pm Like I said, Reichu is going to terminate this soon (Terminator theme in background: duh duh duh, DUH DUH)
